import { codeAnchor, codeAnchorId, ref } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// The binding itself is well-formed; the parse break further down poisons the file, and a binding
// in a parse-broken code file must fail loudly rather than ride an untrustworthy AST into the
// graph (L2).
export const parseBrokenBinding = codeAnchor({
  id: codeAnchorId("impl:orders.parse-broken-binding"),
  satisfies: ref("spec:orders.healthy-sibling"),
});

export const danglingProse = `unterminated
